# Octopus AI

> Octopus AI is the autonomous execution engine for sales & marketing. It unifies 15+ AI-powered modules into a single cockpit for solopreneurs, small businesses, and marketing teams.

## Overview

Octopus AI automates the full pipeline from lead capture to content creation to multi-channel distribution. Its core agent system — OCTOPUS (RAG 2.0+) — orchestrates all modules via natural language conversation with 5-layer retrieval.

## Website

https://octopuskills.com

## Documentation

- Source Code: https://github.com/AJAEL11/proyecto-alfa-octopus
- Architecture: https://github.com/AJAEL11/proyecto-alfa-octopus/blob/main/architecture.md
- Specification: https://github.com/AJAEL11/proyecto-alfa-octopus/blob/main/specification.md
- CitableHub Profile: https://citablehub.com/project/octopus-ai

## Core Modules

- OCTOPUS (RAG 2.0+): Conversational AI agent with 5-layer retrieval (semantic memory, knowledge base, vectors, graph, arms)
- Creative Studio: AI-powered asset generation — images, videos, audio, documents
- Growth Engine: Smart prospecting with automated lead scoring and campaign creation
- Ad Factory: Generate ads for Facebook, Instagram, Google, TikTok
- Motion Graphics: AI video generation with Veo 3.1, Kling, Seedance
- Sales Agent: Embeddable AI sales agents with real-time lead capture
- Voice Agent: Premium TTS with ElevenLabs and real-time STT
- Social Bridge: Auto-publish to 8+ social networks
- Code Engine: AI website generator with real-time preview and deploy to Vercel/Netlify/Railway
- Agent Factory: Create and deploy custom AI agents
- Skill Factory: Build reusable modular AI skills
- Ollama Chat: Private local AI with Llama, Mistral, DeepSeek
- Task Manager: AI-enhanced task management
- Smart Calendar: AI-powered scheduling
- Quick Invoice: AI-assisted invoice generation
- Smart Home (IoT): Shelly device control
- API Hub: Visual API configuration

## Integrations (Brazos/Arms)

- GitHub: Push/pull repos, branches, commits, AI code review
- Gmail: Full read/write (list, search, send, draft, reply)
- Google Workspace: Calendar and Drive
- Telegram: Bot messaging
- WhatsApp: Business messaging
- SMTP: Custom email
- Ollama: Local LLM models
- Web3Forms: Form handling

## Languages

- Spanish (primary)
- English

## Pricing

- Starter: Free ($0/mo)
- Pro: $49/mo
- Enterprise: $299/mo

## Company

Built by Wildverse LLC
